channel.title: Gridlas — Powering AI: the U.S. Data Center Buildout
channel.description: Independent research on the U.S. AI data-center buildout and the power grid — built from public EIA, LBNL, ERCOT & CBRE data, every figure cited.

item.title: The grid bottleneck: can the U.S. power the AI buildout through 2030?
item.description: Why the real limit on AI isn't power plants — it's the interconnection queue, where median waits doubled to ~5 years and ~77% of proposed capacity is withdrawn.

item.title: Powering around the queue: how AI is buying its way past the grid
item.description: Behind-the-meter gas, nuclear restarts, and small modular reactors — the deals, megawatts and dates, primary-source cited.

item.title: The water problem: the constraint with no workaround
item.description: Cooling-water intensity, hyperscaler use, and why ~2/3 of new U.S. data centers sit in high-water-stress areas.

item.title: The Texas power rush: can the grid handle the AI boom?
item.description: 226 GW queued in ERCOT, ~77% data centers — the AI race is now a transmission problem, not a generation one.

item.title: Data Center Alley's dilemma: can Northern Virginia power its future?
item.description: The world's largest data-center market at ~4,040 MW — where power availability is now the number-one constraint.

item.title: The 4.5-year wait: America's power grid is bottlenecking the AI boom
item.description: The interconnection queue explained: why the power for the next AI generation was decided half a decade ago.

item.title: Data centers by U.S. region: 16 markets, mapped
item.description: Power demand, queues and constraints across Northern Virginia, Texas, Phoenix, Atlanta, Ohio and 11 more markets.

item.title: Glossary: AI data centers & the power grid
item.description: Plain-English, cited definitions of the terms behind the AI power buildout — interconnection queue, hyperscale, PUE, WUE, SMR and more.

item.title: Data center power & water estimator
item.description: A free calculator: enter a facility size and U.S. market, see power draw, homes-equivalent, grid wait and water footprint instantly.
